subject: fix(a11y): polish accessibility, inline styles, and test coverage
body:
- Add aria-label to ShowMoreButton for screen readers
- Add type="button" to DetailPane close button (prevents implicit submit)
- Focus first menu item when HamburgerMenu opens (keyboard discoverability)
- Move Projects error card inline style to .projects-error CSS class
- Add arrow key, Enter/Space keyboard test scenarios to TESTING_GUIDE.md
- Update SESSION_NOTES.md with all polish changes

Tags: accessibility, ui, testing, cleanup
